summary: Comprehensive unit tests for Service covering summarization logic, queue processing, API errors, and local model configuration
side_effects: creates temporary SQLite databases for testing
tests API mock failures and error propagation
notes: Test suite validates: single message summarization, short message copy-verbatim behavior, 150-char threshold, API error handling, queue processing with time windows (today/yesterday), channel filtering, local model prompt preamble injection, and persistence to storage layer.
